positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cosmic forest scene, featuring towering bioluminescent flora and meandering glowing pathways. The central element is a charming, stylized group of small mythical creatures (like stylized pixies or gentle forest sprites) interacting with floating constellations and giant, glowing mushrooms. Style should be reminiscent of vintage botanical engravings mixed with modern digital whimsy (e.g., a blend of Alphonse Mucha's fluidity and modern flat graphic design). Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and pops of vibrant gold and cyan. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, with clear, strong silhouettes and a high contrast look suitable for a central chest print on apparel. Crisp line work, vector art quality, magical realism, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting.
negative: photorealistic, fuzzy, bokeh, grainy, amateur, blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, complex background clutter
